name: Druid

abilities.name: Wrath
abilities.desc: Hurls a bolt of nature energy for $d Nature damage.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.desc: Heals a friendly target for $d.

abilities.name: Mark of the Wild
abilities.desc: Places the Mark of the Wild on a friendly target, increasing armor by 25 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Moonfire
abilities.desc: Burns the enemy with moonfire for $d Arcane damage plus damage over time.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.desc: Heals the target for $d over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Thorns
abilities.desc: Thorns sprout from the target: melee attackers take 3 Nature damage.

abilities.name: Entangling Roots
abilities.desc: Roots the target in place for up to 12 sec.

abilities.name: Bear Form
abilities.desc: Shapeshift into a bear: armor +65%, attack power +15, your attacks build rage and generate 30% more threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Bear Charge
abilities.desc: Charge an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.desc: A mauling attack that increases melee damage by $d and causes a high amount of threat. Activates on your next swing. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Growl
abilities.desc: Growls at the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Roar
abilities.desc: Demoralizes nearby enemies, reducing their attack power by 20 for 20 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Wolf Form
abilities.desc: Shapeshift into a wolf: agility rises with your level, attack power +8 plus 2 per level, your attacks use energy and combo points, and you generate 29% less threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.desc: Enter stealth while in Wolf Form, moving 50% slower. Cannot be used in combat.

abilities.name: Rake
abilities.desc: A stealth opener that rakes the enemy for weapon damage plus $d and causes bleeding damage over 9 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Claw
abilities.desc: Claw the enemy for weapon damage plus $d. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Regrowth
abilities.desc: Heals a friendly target for $d and an additional amount over 21 sec.

abilities.name: Ferocious Bite
abilities.desc: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Barkskin
abilities.desc: Your skin hardens like bark, increasing armor by 150 for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Swipe
abilities.desc: Swipe nearby enemies for $d damage. Causes extra threat. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Starfire
abilities.desc: Calls down a bolt of stellar fire, causing $d Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Travel Form
abilities.desc: Instantly shift into a swift travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. You cannot use other abilities while shifted, but can shift in or out of combat, ideal for escaping.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.desc: Generates 20 rage instantly. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.desc: Stuns the target for 2 sec. Bear Form only.

abilities.name: Faerie Fire
abilities.desc: Decreases the target's armor by 35 for 40 sec.

abilities.name: Hibernate
abilities.desc: Forces the target into a deep sleep for up to 8 sec. Any damage will awaken it.

abilities.name: Dash
abilities.desc: Sprint forward, increasing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.desc: A stealth opener that stuns the target for 2 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Insect Swarm
abilities.desc: The enemy is swarmed by insects, taking $d Nature damage over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Tiger's Fury
abilities.desc: Increases attack power by 40 for 6 sec. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Rip
abilities.desc: Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over 12 sec. Consumes combo points. Wolf Form only.

abilities.name: Hurricane
abilities.desc: Calls a hurricane onto the target area, battering enemies for $d Nature damage.

playbook: You are playing a Druid (mana-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
